login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the platform
login.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

logout.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?

resetPassword.title: Reset Password

updatePassword.title: Update Password

errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.resetLinkExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
